title: The Tea Party Falls Apart
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Chiffon, Unknown person #1, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #2, Judge, Unknown person #3 as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: Get out here, Bege!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Straw HAT!!!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Wait, Mama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: bege is my husband, and we even have a child.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please spare us and overlook this!!

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: Chiffon...

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: As usual, you look exactly like Lola.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I told you not to...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Show that FAAAACE!!!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: MAMA...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you're also an accomplice for the ASSASSI- NATION!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dont think that you'll be able to eat snacks tomorrow!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Someone nonsense

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If the castle is destroyed, bege will die...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: and everyone inside will be thrown out...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't let a single one of them get away...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: fire tank pirates, the straw hat crew, jinbe,

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: And Germa 66...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They turned the wedding ceremony and the tea party...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: into such a mess...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It looks like we've been seriously under- estimated.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's hang them up as an example to the rest of the world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: GUGH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: BEGE!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dammit!! That old Hag...!! she doesn't even flinch at the canonballs.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big Father's defensive power doesn't mean anything to her!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...It's better if I just go out and send her flying!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You can't, Luffy!! Chopper, stop him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey!! Let go of me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't just rush out and start a pointless fight!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our reason for coming here was to retrieve Sanji-Kun, wasn't it!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In addition, we managed to get a transcript of the poneglyph.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We even fulfilled Sanji-kun's wish to save his family!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We've accomplished our goals!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Someone remember

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you've got the time to fight back, use it to think of how to escape!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Because women

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're really planning to fight, you should bring zero and everyone else here together!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Isn't that right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: luffy-san, it's like nami-san said,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We only managed to infiltrated this place because of our low numbers.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's safely head to Wano, where Zoro and everyone else are waiting!!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 43 dialogue beats. The alliance survives the failed tea party by turning the chaos into a retreat.
